chapters.title: Friday Night
chapters.content: Mia arrived in Barcelona on Friday night. The streets were full of music, people were laughing outside restaurants, and the warm air felt perfect.

chapters.title: Walking the City
chapters.content: On Saturday morning, she walked along Las Ramblas, visited colorful markets, and watched street performers dancing in the sun.

chapters.title: Beach Sunset
chapters.content: In the evening, Mia sat by the beach and watched the sunset over the sea. She knew this weekend would stay in her memory forever.
